Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default Judgment And Recall Any Writ Of Execution And/Or Writ Of Attachment Issued; P&As And Decl. In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Jan-29-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Jerome M. Yalon, Jr., Esq., (925-969-1900) appeared on behalf of plaintiff Providian National Bank. Shaye Larkin, Esq., (415-434-8852) specially appeared on behalf of defendant Frank Cheung.

Following argument the motion was granted with ten days leave to answer. (JJM/KH) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
